hints.text: Plates fairly long, white most common; **private = red, public = black**
All road coverage is **shitcam** (low-quality: brownish colours, often a big circular blur over the car)
Drives **left**; **Devanagari** (line across the top + vertical strokes); ङ/ङ्ग commoner than in Hindi; native Devanagari numbers (rare in India)
Poles: square concrete (flatlands) / thin metal (mountains); **trident poletop w/ triangle supports** is unique to Nepal
**Outer yellow road lines** (dashed or solid) + dashed white middle on bigger roads
**Black-and-white striped concrete bollards w/ a red top** (3–5 stripes)
**Flat agricultural south** (Indian border) + **high-altitude mountain roads** in the north
Buildings colorful blocky or painted concrete/brick/thatch, tiled or tin roofs, often w/ **triangle-shaped facade decorations**
White Buddhist **stupas, sometimes w/ painted eyes** on the sides — only found in Nepal
